stream.$comment: Optional props if source is set to 'stream'.

gfn.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'gfn'.

local.$comment: DATE Phase 0.5+ — defaults to date-viewer-streaming on :49102 (clean customer-facing kit-app). mfo.date_viewer.environment extension (commit f712e12) closes the empty-stage rendering: DistantLight + auto-frame on ASSETS_LOADED so dropped/picked assets render lit and centered. Use ?stream_port=49100 for Composer (the Twin Architect's authoring tool).
